summary: Redesigned bootstrap semantics so smart_platform_bootstrap owns only repeat-safe platform baseline behavior, while the temporary smart_construction_bootstrap shim can continue to carry fresh-DB-only currency initialization during the compatibility phase.

verification.command: repository audit of legacy hook + reset/verify/runbook references

next_suggestion: Open the next implementation batch to move currency bootstrap out of smart_platform_bootstrap and keep it only in the temporary compatibility shim.
